title: Five Nights at Freddy's 2
description: Welcome back to the new and improved Freddy Fazbear's Pizza! Can you survive five more nights?

title: Funny Shooter Bro
description: A hilarious first-person shooter where you face off against waves of wacky enemies. Use a variety of weapons to survive the chaos!

title: Football Strike
description: Experience the thrill of football in this fast-paced multiplayer game! Score goals, take free kicks, and become the ultimate striker.

title: Stick Merge 2
description: Merge weapons, upgrade your stickman, and take down enemies in this addictive action-puzzle game!

title: Level Devil
description: A challenging platformer where the levels are out to get you! Can you survive the unexpected traps and reach the end?

title: Soccer Skills Euro Cup
description: Show off your soccer skills in this exciting Euro Cup tournament! Dribble, pass, and shoot your way to victory.

title: Lethal Sniper 3D: Army Soldier
description: Become an elite sniper and take down targets in this intense 3D shooter. Complete missions and upgrade your arsenal.

title: Snowball.io
description: Roll the biggest snowball, bump your opponents, and be the last one on the platform in this fun multiplayer game!

title: Geometry Dash Online
description: Jump and fly your way through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer! Play the full Geometry Dash experience online.
